message:
Add rule to auto-load meta:managing-plugins skill

Automatically load the meta:managing-plugins skill when working
with files in the plugins/ directory. This ensures developers have
essential plugin management guidance readily available when creating,
modifying, or reviewing plugins, improving the developer experience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+title: Automatically load meta:managing-plugins skill for plugin development
+type: change
+authors:
+- mavam
+- claude
+created: 2025-12-12T09:50:29.70154Z
+---
+
+Add a rule that automatically loads the `meta:managing-plugins` skill when working with files in the `plugins/` directory. This improves the developer experience by ensuring the essential plugin management guidance is always available when creating, modifying, or reviewing plugins.
